scenes.text: In this lecture, we will explore Docker, a platform designed to simplify the process of building, deploying, and managing applications in lightweight containers. Docker containers allow developers to package applications with all their dependencies, ensuring consistent environments across development, testing, and production. We will cover key concepts like Docker images, containers, and the Docker ecosystem, explaining their purpose and how they interact with each other.
scenes.image_prompt: graph LR; A[Docker Engine] --> B[Docker Image]; B --> C[Docker Container]; A --> D[Docker Hub]; A --> E[Docker Compose]; D --> B;
